1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Product: id, name, price (float), stock (int)
7	- Order: id, user_id (string), status (string), total_amount (float),
8	         created_at, paid_at, shipped_at, delivered_at, cancelled_at
9	- OrderItem: id, order_id (FK), product_id (FK), quantity (int), unit_price (float)
10	- PaymentRequest: id, order_id (FK), idempotency_key (string), status (string), created_at
11	
12	Order status values: 'pending', 'paid', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled'
13	"""
14	
15	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
16	from datetime import datetime
17	import sys
18	import os
19	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
20	
21	from app import db
22	
23	
24	class Product(db.Model):
25	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
26	    name = db.Column(db.String(120), nullable=False)
27	    price = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False)
28	    stock = db.Column(db.Integer, nullable=False, default=0)
29	
30	
31	class Order(db.Model):
32	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
33	    user_id = db.Column(db.String(50), nullable=False)
34	    status = db.Column(db.String(20), nullable=False, default='pending')
35	    total_amount = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False, default=0.0)
36	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
37	    paid_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
38	    shipped_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
39	    delivered_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
40	    cancelled_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
41	    items = db.relationship('OrderItem', backref='order', lazy=True)
42	
43	
44	class OrderItem(db.Model):
45	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
46	    order_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
47	    product_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('product.id'), nullable=False)
48	    quantity = db.Column(db.Integer, nullable=False)
49	    unit_price = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False)
50	
51	
52	class PaymentRequest(db.Model):
53	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
54	    order_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
55	    idempotency_key = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False, unique=True)
56	    status = db.Column(db.String(20), nullable=False, default='pending')
57	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
58

1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Product Routes
3	
4	Implement product CRUD routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'product_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- GET /products -> List all products
9	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}, ...]}
10	
11	- POST /products -> Create product
12	  Request: {"name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}
13	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}}
14	  Errors: 400 if any required field missing
15	
16	- GET /products/<id> -> Get single product
17	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}}
18	  Errors: 404 if not found
19	
20	IMPORTANT: Products are used by routes_order.py for inventory management.
21	Make sure the Product model fields match what the order routes expect.
22	"""
23	
24	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
25	from app import db
26	from models import Product
27	
28	product_bp = Blueprint('product_bp', __name__)
29	
30	
31	@product_bp.route('/products', methods=['POST'])
32	def create_product():
33	    data = request.get_json()
34	    if not data or 'name' not in data or 'price' not in data or 'stock' not in data:
35	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing required fields'}), 400
36	    product = Product(name=data['name'], price=data['price'], stock=data['stock'])
37	    db.session.add(product)
38	    db.session.commit()
39	    return jsonify({
40	        'status': 'ok',
41	        'data': {
42	            'id': product.id,
43	            'name': product.name,
44	            'price': product.price,
45	            'stock': product.stock,
46	        }
47	    }), 201
48	
49	
50	@product_bp.route('/products', methods=['GET'])
51	def list_products():
52	    products = Product.query.all()
53	    return jsonify({
54	        'status': 'ok',
55	        'data': [
56	            {'id': p.id, 'name': p.name, 'price': p.price, 'stock': p.stock}
57	            for p in products
58	        ]
59	    }), 200
60	
61	
62	@product_bp.route('/products/<int:product_id>', methods=['GET'])
63	def get_product(product_id):
64	    product = db.session.get(Product, product_id)
65	    if product is None:
66	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Product not found'}), 404
67	    return jsonify({
68	        'status': 'ok',
69	        'data': {
70	            'id': product.id,
71	            'name': product.name,
72	            'price': product.price,
73	            'stock': product.stock,
74	        }
75	    }), 200
76

1	"""
2	T2-2 订单系统测试（多模块版本）
3	
4	测试订单 CRUD、状态机、库存扣减、幂等付款。
5	"""
6	
7	import os
8	import sys
9	import pytest
10	
11	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '..', 'starter'))
12	
13	from app import create_app, db
14	from models import Product, Order, OrderItem
15	
16	
17	@pytest.fixture
18	def client():
19	    """创建测试客户端"""
20	    app = create_app()
21	    app.config['TESTING'] = True
22	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///:memory:'
23	
24	    with app.test_client() as c:
25	        with app.app_context():
26	            db.drop_all()
27	            db.create_all()
28	        yield c
29	
30	
31	def _seed_product(client, name='测试商品', price=99.9, stock=10):
32	    """创建测试商品"""
33	    with client.application.app_context():
34	        p = Product(name=name, price=price, stock=stock)
35	        db.session.add(p)
36	        db.session.commit()
37	        return p.id
38	
39	
40	# ============================================================
41	# 商品接口测试
42	# ============================================================
43	
44	class TestProductCRUD:
45	    def test_create_product(self, client):
46	        """创建商品"""
47	        resp = client.post('/products', json={'name': 'Laptop', 'price': 1000, 'stock': 5})
48	        assert resp.status_code == 201
49	        assert resp.json['status'] == 'ok'
50	
51	    def test_list_products(self, client):
52	        """列出所有商品"""
53	        _seed_product(client)
54	        resp = client.get('/products')
55	        assert resp.status_code == 200
56	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 1
57	
58	    def test_get_product(self, client):
59	        """获取单个商品"""
60	        pid = _seed_product(client)
61	        resp = client.get(f'/products/{pid}')
62	        assert resp.status_code == 200
63	        assert resp.json['data']['price'] == 99.9
64	
65	
66	# ============================================================
67	# 订单 CRUD 测试
68	# ============================================================
69	
70	class TestOrderCRUD:
71	    def test_create_order(self, client):
72	        """创建订单成功"""
73	        pid = _seed_product(client)
74	        resp = client.post('/orders', json={
75	            'user_id': 'u1',
76	            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 2}]
77	        })
78	        assert resp.status_code == 201
79	        data = resp.json['data']
80	        assert data['status'] == 'pending'
81	        assert data['user_id'] == 'u1'
82	
83	    def test_create_order_insufficient_stock(self, client):
84	        """库存不足时创建订单应失败"""
85	        pid = _seed_product(client, stock=1)
86	        resp = client.post('/orders', json={
87	            'user_id': 'u1',
88	            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 5}]
89	        })
90	        assert resp.status_code == 400
91	
92	    def test_create_order_total_calculation(self, client):
93	        """多商品订单总价计算正确"""
94	        p1_id = _seed_product(client, name='A', price=100.0, stock=5)
95	        p2_id = _seed_product(client, name='B', price=200.0, stock=8)
96	        resp = client.post('/orders', json={
97	            'user_id': 'u1',
98	            'items': [
99	                {'product_id': p1_id, 'quantity': 2},
100	                {'product_id': p2_id, 'quantity': 3}
101	            ]
102	        })
103	        assert resp.status_code == 201
104	        assert abs(resp.json['data']['total_amount'] - 800.0) < 0.01
105	
106	    def test_filter_orders(self, client):
107	        """按 user_id 和 status 筛选订单"""
108	        pid = _seed_product(client, stock=100)
109	        client.post('/orders', json={'user_id': 'u1', 'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 1}]})
110	        client.post('/orders', json={'user_id': 'u1', 'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 1}]})
111	        client.post('/orders', json={'user_id': 'u2', 'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': 1}]})
112	
113	        resp = client.get('/orders?user_id=u1')
114	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 2
115	
116	        resp = client.get('/orders?status=pending')
117	        assert len(resp.json['data']) == 3
118	
119	
120	# ============================================================
121	# 状态机测试
122	# ============================================================
123	
124	class TestStateMachine:
125	    def _create_order(self, client, pid, quantity=1):
126	        resp = client.post('/orders', json={
127	            'user_id': 'u1',
128	            'items': [{'product_id': pid, 'quantity': quantity}]
129	        })
130	        return resp.json['data']
131	
132	    def test_pay_order(self, client):
133	        """支付订单（pending → paid）"""
134	        pid = _seed_product(client)
135	        order = self._create_order(client, pid)
136	        resp = client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/pay',
137	                          headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'key-001'})
138	        assert resp.status_code == 200
139	        assert resp.json['data']['status'] == 'paid'
140	
141	    def test_ship_order(self, client):
142	        """发货（paid → shipped）"""
143	        pid = _seed_product(client)
144	        order = self._create_order(client, pid)
145	        client.post(f'/orders/{order["id"]}/pay', headers={'Idempotency-Key': 'key-002'})

"""
T2 Order System — Order Routes

Implement order CRUD, state machine, and payment with idempotency.
Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'order_bp'.

Order state machine:
  pending → paid → shipped → delivered
  pending/paid → cancelled

Requirements:
- POST /orders -> Create order
  Request: {"user_id": str, "items": [{"product_id": int, "quantity": int}, ...]}
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": "pending",
            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}}
  - Validates all products exist and stock is available
  - Creates OrderItem records for each product
  - total_amount = sum of (product.price * quantity) for all items
Errors: 400 if invalid data, product not found, or insufficient stock

- GET /orders/<id> -> Get order with items
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str,
            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str,
            "items": [{"id": int, "product_id": int, "quantity": int, "unit_price": float}, ...]}}
  Errors: 404 if not found

- GET /orders -> List orders, filter by user_id and/or status
  Query params: user_id, status
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}

- POST /orders/<id>/pay -> Pay for order (pending → paid)
  Header: Idempotency-Key (required)
  - Deducts stock from products
  - Records PaymentRequest for idempotency
  - Duplicate Idempotency-Key returns same result without re-processing
Errors: 404 if order not found, 400 if no key, 409 if invalid state transition

- POST /orders/<id>/ship -> Ship order (paid → shipped)
  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state

- POST /orders/<id>/deliver -> Deliver order (shipped → delivered)
  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state

- POST /orders/<id>/cancel -> Cancel order (pending/paid → cancelled)
  - Restores product stock if order was paid
Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state

IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest, Product)
and routes_product.py. Stock deduction happens at payment time, not order creation.
"""

from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify

order_bp = Blueprint('order_bp', __name__)

input.new_string:
"""
T2 Order System — Order Routes

Implement order CRUD, state machine, and payment with idempotency.
Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'order_bp'.

Order state machine:
  pending → paid → shipped → delivered
  pending/paid → cancelled

Requirements:
- POST /orders -> Create order
  Request: {"user_id": str, "items": [{"product_id": int, "quantity": int}, ...]}
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": "pending",
            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}}
  - Validates all products exist and stock is available
  - Creates OrderItem records for each product
  - total_amount = sum of (product.price * quantity) for all items
Errors: 400 if invalid data, product not found, or insufficient stock

- GET /orders/<id> -> Get order with items
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str,
            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str,
            "items": [{"id": int, "product_id": int, "quantity": int, "unit_price": float}, ...]}}
  Errors: 404 if not found

- GET /orders -> List orders, filter by user_id and/or status
  Query params: user_id, status
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}

- POST /orders/<id>/pay -> Pay for order (pending → paid)
  Header: Idempotency-Key (required)
  - Deducts stock from products
  - Records PaymentRequest for idempotency
  - Duplicate Idempotency-Key returns same result without re-processing
Errors: 404 if order not found, 400 if no key, 409 if invalid state transition

- POST /orders/<id>/ship -> Ship order (paid → shipped)
  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state

- POST /orders/<id>/deliver -> Deliver order (shipped → delivered)
  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state

- POST /orders/<id>/cancel -> Cancel order (pending/paid → cancelled)
  - Restores product stock if order was paid
Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state

IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest, Product)
and routes_product.py. Stock deduction happens at payment time, not order creation.
"""

from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
from app import db
from models import Order, OrderItem, Product

order_bp = Blueprint('order_bp', __name__)


@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['POST'])
def create_order():
    """Create a new order with validated product items."""
    data = request.get_json()
    if not data or 'user_id' not in data or 'items' not in data:
        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing required fields'}), 400

    items = data['items']
    if not isinstance(items, list) or len(items) == 0:
        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Items must be a non-empty list'}), 400

    # Validate all products exist and stock is sufficient
    product_map = {}
    total_amount = 0.0
    for item in items:
        pid = item.get('product_id')
        qty = item.get('quantity')
        if pid is None or qty is None or qty <= 0:
            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid item data'}), 400

        product = db.session.get(Product, pid)
        if product is None:
            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Product {pid} not found'}), 400
        if product.stock < qty:
            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Insufficient stock for product {pid}'}), 400

        product_map[pid] = product
        total_amount += product.price * qty

    # Create order and order items
    order = Order(user_id=data['user_id'], status='pending', total_amount=total_amount)
    db.session.add(order)
    db.session.flush()  # get order.id

    for item in items:
        pid = item['product_id']
        product = product_map[pid]
        order_item = OrderItem(
            order_id=order.id,
            product_id=pid,
            quantity=item['quantity'],
            unit_price=product.price,
        )
        db.session.add(order_item)

    db.session.commit()
    return jsonify({
        'status': 'ok',
        'data': {
            'id': order.id,
            'user_id': order.user_id,
            'status': order.status,
            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
        }
    }), 201


@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>', methods=['GET'])
def get_order(order_id):
    """Get order detail including items list."""
    order = db.session.get(Order, order_id)
    if order is None:
        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Order not found'}), 404

    return jsonify({
        'status': 'ok',
        'data': {
            'id': order.id,
            'user_id': order.user_id,
            'status': order.status,
            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
            'items': [
                {
                    'id': item.id,
                    'product_id': item.product_id,
                    'quantity': item.quantity,
                    'unit_price': item.unit_price,
                }
                for item in order.items
            ],
        }
    }), 200


@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['GET'])
def list_orders():
    """List orders with optional user_id and status filters."""
    query = Order.query
    user_id = request.args.get('user_id')
    status = request.args.get('status')

    if user_id is not None:
        query = query.filter_by(user_id=user_id)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter_by(status=status)

    orders = query.all()
    return jsonify({
        'status': 'ok',
        'data': [
            {
                'id': o.id,
                'user_id': o.user_id,
                'status': o.status,
                'total_amount': o.total_amount,
                'created_at': o.created_at.isoformat() if o.created_at else None,
            }
            for o in orders
        ]
    }), 200

Implement order CRUD, state machine, and payment with idempotency.
Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'order_bp'.

Order state machine:
  pending -> paid -> shipped -> delivered
  pending/paid -> cancelled

Requirements:
- POST /orders -> Create order
  Request: {"user_id": str, "items": [{"product_id": int, "quantity": int}, ...]}
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": "pending",

  - Validates all products exist and stock is available
  - Creates OrderItem records for each product
  - total_amount = sum of (product.price * quantity) for all items
Errors: 400 if invalid data, product not found, or insufficient stock

- GET /orders/<id> -> Get order with items
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str,
            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str,
            "items": [{"id": int, "product_id": int, "quantity": int, "unit_price": float}, ...]}}
  Errors: 404 if not found

- GET /orders -> List orders, filter by user_id and/or status
  Query params: user_id, status
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}

- POST /orders/<id>/pay -> Pay for order (pending -> paid)
  Header: Idempotency-Key (required)
  - Deducts stock from products
  - Records PaymentRequest for idempotency
  - Duplicate Idempotency-Key returns same result without re-processing
Errors: 404 if order not found, 400 if no key, 409 if invalid state transition

- POST /orders/<id>/ship -> Ship order (paid -> shipped)
  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state

- POST /orders/<id>/deliver -> Deliver order (shipped -> delivered)
  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state

- POST /orders/<id>/cancel -> Cancel order (pending/paid -> cancelled)
  - Restores product stock if order was paid
Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state

IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest, Product)
and routes_product.py. Stock deduction happens at payment time, not order creation.
"""

from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
from app import db
from models import Order, OrderItem, Product

order_bp = Blueprint('order_bp', __name__)


@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['POST'])
def create_order():
    """Create a new order with validated product items."""
    data = request.get_json()
    if not data or 'user_id' not in data or 'items' not in data:
        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing required fields'}), 400

    items = data['items']
    if not isinstance(items, list) or len(items) == 0:
        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Items must be a non-empty list'}), 400

    # Validate all products exist and stock is sufficient
    product_map = {}
    total_amount = 0.0
    for item in items:
        pid = item.get('product_id')
        qty = item.get('quantity')
        if pid is None or qty is None or qty <= 0:
            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid item data'}), 400

        product = db.session.get(Product, pid)
        if product is None:
            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Product {pid} not found'}), 400
        if product.stock < qty:
            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Insufficient stock for product {pid}'}), 400

        product_map[pid] = product
        total_amount += product.price * qty

    # Create order and order items
    order = Order(user_id=data['user_id'], status='pending', total_amount=total_amount)
    db.session.add(order)
    db.session.flush()  # get order.id

    for item in items:
        pid = item['product_id']
        product = product_map[pid]
        order_item = OrderItem(
            order_id=order.id,
            product_id=pid,
            quantity=item['quantity'],
            unit_price=product.price,
        )
        db.session.add(order_item)

    db.session.commit()
    return jsonify({
        'status': 'ok',
        'data': {
            'id': order.id,
            'user_id': order.user_id,
            'status': order.status,
            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
        }
    }), 201


@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>', methods=['GET'])
def get_order(order_id):
    """Get order detail including items list."""
    order = db.session.get(Order, order_id)
    if order is None:
        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Order not found'}), 404

    return jsonify({
        'status': 'ok',
        'data': {
            'id': order.id,
            'user_id': order.user_id,
            'status': order.status,
            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
            'items': [
                {
                    'id': item.id,
                    'product_id': item.product_id,
                    'quantity': item.quantity,
                    'unit_price': item.unit_price,
                }
                for item in order.items
            ],
        }
    }), 200


@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['GET'])
def list_orders():
    """List orders with optional user_id and status filters."""
    query = Order.query
    user_id = request.args.get('user_id')
    status = request.args.get('status')

    if user_id is not None:
        query = query.filter_by(user_id=user_id)
    if status is not None:
        query = query.filter_by(status=status)

    orders = query.all()
    return jsonify({
        'status': 'ok',
        'data': [
            {
                'id': o.id,
                'user_id': o.user_id,
                'status': o.status,
                'total_amount': o.total_amount,
                'created_at': o.created_at.isoformat() if o.created_at else None,
            }
            for o in orders
        ]
    }), 200

15	            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}}
16	  - Validates all products exist and stock is available
17	  - Creates OrderItem records for each product
18	  - total_amount = sum of (product.price * quantity) for all items
19	Errors: 400 if invalid data, product not found, or insufficient stock
20	
21	- GET /orders/<id> -> Get order with items
22	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str,
23	            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str,
24	            "items": [{"id": int, "product_id": int, "quantity": int, "unit_price": float}, ...]}}
25	  Errors: 404 if not found
26	
27	- GET /orders -> List orders, filter by user_id and/or status
28	  Query params: user_id, status
29	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}
30	
31	- POST /orders/<id>/pay -> Pay for order (pending -> paid)
32	  Header: Idempotency-Key (required)
33	  - Deducts stock from products
34	  - Records PaymentRequest for idempotency
35	  - Duplicate Idempotency-Key returns same result without re-processing
36	Errors: 404 if order not found, 400 if no key, 409 if invalid state transition
37	
38	- POST /orders/<id>/ship -> Ship order (paid -> shipped)
39	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
40	
41	- POST /orders/<id>/deliver -> Deliver order (shipped -> delivered)
42	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
43	
44	- POST /orders/<id>/cancel -> Cancel order (pending/paid -> cancelled)
45	  - Restores product stock if order was paid
46	Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
47	
48	IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest, Product)
49	and routes_product.py. Stock deduction happens at payment time, not order creation.
50	"""
51	
52	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
53	from app import db
54	from models import Order, OrderItem, Product
55	
56	order_bp = Blueprint('order_bp', __name__)
57	
58	
59	@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['POST'])
60	def create_order():
61	    """Create a new order with validated product items."""
62	    data = request.get_json()
63	    if not data or 'user_id' not in data or 'items' not in data:
64	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing required fields'}), 400
65	
66	    items = data['items']
67	    if not isinstance(items, list) or len(items) == 0:
68	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Items must be a non-empty list'}), 400
69	
70	    # Validate all products exist and stock is sufficient
71	    product_map = {}
72	    total_amount = 0.0
73	    for item in items:
74	        pid = item.get('product_id')
75	        qty = item.get('quantity')
76	        if pid is None or qty is None or qty <= 0:
77	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid item data'}), 400
78	
79	        product = db.session.get(Product, pid)
80	        if product is None:
81	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Product {pid} not found'}), 400
82	        if product.stock < qty:
83	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Insufficient stock for product {pid}'}), 400
84	
85	        product_map[pid] = product
86	        total_amount += product.price * qty
87	
88	    # Create order and order items
89	    order = Order(user_id=data['user_id'], status='pending', total_amount=total_amount)
90	    db.session.add(order)
91	    db.session.flush()  # get order.id
92	
93	    for item in items:
94	        pid = item['product_id']
95	        product = product_map[pid]
96	        order_item = OrderItem(
97	            order_id=order.id,
98	            product_id=pid,
99	            quantity=item['quantity'],
100	            unit_price=product.price,
101	        )
102	        db.session.add(order_item)
103	
104	    db.session.commit()
105	    return jsonify({
106	        'status': 'ok',
107	        'data': {
108	            'id': order.id,
109	            'user_id': order.user_id,
110	            'status': order.status,
111	            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
112	            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
113	        }
114	    }), 201
115	
116	
117	@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>', methods=['GET'])
118	def get_order(order_id):
119	    """Get order detail including items list."""
120	    order = db.session.get(Order, order_id)
121	    if order is None:
122	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Order not found'}), 404
123	
124	    return jsonify({
125	        'status': 'ok',
126	        'data': {
127	            'id': order.id,
128	            'user_id': order.user_id,
129	            'status': order.status,
130	            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
131	            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
132	            'items': [
133	                {
134	                    'id': item.id,
135	                    'product_id': item.product_id,
136	                    'quantity': item.quantity,
137	                    'unit_price': item.unit_price,
138	                }
139	                for item in order.items
140	            ],
141	        }
142	    }), 200
143	
144	
145	@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['GET'])
146	def list_orders():
147	    """List orders with optional user_id and status filters."""
148	    query = Order.query
149	    user_id = request.args.get('user_id')
150	    status = request.args.get('status')
151	
152	    if user_id is not None:
153	        query = query.filter_by(user_id=user_id)
154	    if status is not None:
155	        query = query.filter_by(status=status)
156	
157	    orders = query.all()
158	    return jsonify({
159	        'status': 'ok',
160	        'data': [
161	            {
162	                'id': o.id,
163	                'user_id': o.user_id,
164	                'status': o.status,
165	                'total_amount': o.total_amount,
166	                'created_at': o.created_at.isoformat() if o.created_at else None,
167	            }
168	            for o in orders
169	        ]
170	    }), 200
171

## Summary

**Modified file:**

- `/Users/harry/Workspaces/disclaude/workspace/mem-agent-pm/experiment/results/scrum_t2_order_4/workspace/starter/routes_order.py`

**Changes made:**

Replaced the empty stub with three route handlers:

1. **`POST /orders`** (`create_order`) -- Validates request body for `user_id` and `items`, checks that all referenced products exist and have sufficient stock, calculates `total_amount` as the sum of `price * quantity` for each item, creates the `Order` record with `status='pending'`, creates `OrderItem` records with `unit_price` set from the product's current price, and returns 201 with the order data. Returns 400 for invalid data, missing products, or insufficient stock.

2. **`GET /orders/<id>`** (`get_order`) -- Retrieves the order by primary key, includes the `items` relationship (each item has `id`, `product_id`, `quantity`, `unit_price`), returns 200 or 404 if not found.

3. **`GET /orders`** (`list_orders`) -- Builds a query on `Order` and optionally filters by `user_id` and/or `status` query parameters. Returns a list of orders (without items, for performance).

**Technical decisions:**

- Used `db.session.get(Product, pid)` for product lookups (consistent with the pattern in `routes_product.py`).
- Used `db.session.flush()` after adding the order to get `order.id` before creating `OrderItem` records, then a single `db.session.commit()` at the end for atomicity.
- Did **not** implement any state machine endpoints (`/pay`, `/ship`, `/deliver`, `/cancel`) as those belong to ATU-003.

1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Order Routes
3	
4	Implement order CRUD, state machine, and payment with idempotency.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'order_bp'.
6	
7	Order state machine:
8	  pending -> paid -> shipped -> delivered
9	  pending/paid -> cancelled
10	
11	Requirements:
12	- POST /orders -> Create order
13	  Request: {"user_id": str, "items": [{"product_id": int, "quantity": int}, ...]}
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": "pending",
15	            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}}
16	  - Validates all products exist and stock is available
17	  - Creates OrderItem records for each product
18	  - total_amount = sum of (product.price * quantity) for all items
19	Errors: 400 if invalid data, product not found, or insufficient stock
20	
21	- GET /orders/<id> -> Get order with items
22	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str,
23	            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str,
24	            "items": [{"id": int, "product_id": int, "quantity": int, "unit_price": float}, ...]}}
25	  Errors: 404 if not found
26	
27	- GET /orders -> List orders, filter by user_id and/or status
28	  Query params: user_id, status
29	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}
30	
31	- POST /orders/<id>/pay -> Pay for order (pending -> paid)
32	  Header: Idempotency-Key (required)
33	  - Deducts stock from products
34	  - Records PaymentRequest for idempotency
35	  - Duplicate Idempotency-Key returns same result without re-processing
36	Errors: 404 if order not found, 400 if no key, 409 if invalid state transition
37	
38	- POST /orders/<id>/ship -> Ship order (paid -> shipped)
39	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
40	
41	- POST /orders/<id>/deliver -> Deliver order (shipped -> delivered)
42	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
43	
44	- POST /orders/<id>/cancel -> Cancel order (pending/paid -> cancelled)
45	  - Restores product stock if order was paid
46	Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
47	
48	IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest, Product)
49	and routes_product.py. Stock deduction happens at payment time, not order creation.
50	"""
51	
52	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
53	from app import db
54	from models import Order, OrderItem, Product
55	
56	order_bp = Blueprint('order_bp', __name__)
57	
58	
59	@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['POST'])
60	def create_order():
61	    """Create a new order with validated product items."""
62	    data = request.get_json()
63	    if not data or 'user_id' not in data or 'items' not in data:
64	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing required fields'}), 400
65	
66	    items = data['items']
67	    if not isinstance(items, list) or len(items) == 0:
68	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Items must be a non-empty list'}), 400
69	
70	    # Validate all products exist and stock is sufficient
71	    product_map = {}
72	    total_amount = 0.0
73	    for item in items:
74	        pid = item.get('product_id')
75	        qty = item.get('quantity')
76	        if pid is None or qty is None or qty <= 0:
77	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid item data'}), 400
78	
79	        product = db.session.get(Product, pid)
80	        if product is None:
81	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Product {pid} not found'}), 400
82	        if product.stock < qty:
83	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Insufficient stock for product {pid}'}), 400
84	
85	        product_map[pid] = product
86	        total_amount += product.price * qty
87	
88	    # Create order and order items
89	    order = Order(user_id=data['user_id'], status='pending', total_amount=total_amount)
90	    db.session.add(order)
91	    db.session.flush()  # get order.id
92	
93	    for item in items:
94	        pid = item['product_id']
95	        product = product_map[pid]
96	        order_item = OrderItem(
97	            order_id=order.id,
98	            product_id=pid,
99	            quantity=item['quantity'],
100	            unit_price=product.price,
101	        )
102	        db.session.add(order_item)
103	
104	    db.session.commit()
105	    return jsonify({
106	        'status': 'ok',
107	        'data': {
108	            'id': order.id,
109	            'user_id': order.user_id,
110	            'status': order.status,
111	            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
112	            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
113	        }
114	    }), 201
115	
116	
117	@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>', methods=['GET'])
118	def get_order(order_id):
119	    """Get order detail including items list."""
120	    order = db.session.get(Order, order_id)
121	    if order is None:
122	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Order not found'}), 404
123	
124	    return jsonify({
125	        'status': 'ok',
126	        'data': {
127	            'id': order.id,
128	            'user_id': order.user_id,
129	            'status': order.status,
130	            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
131	            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
132	            'items': [
133	                {
134	                    'id': item.id,
135	                    'product_id': item.product_id,
136	                    'quantity': item.quantity,
137	                    'unit_price': item.unit_price,
138	                }
139	                for item in order.items
140	            ],
141	        }
142	    }), 200
143	
144	
145	@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['GET'])
146	def list_orders():
147	    """List orders with optional user_id and status filters."""
148	    query = Order.query
149	    user_id = request.args.get('user_id')
150	    status = request.args.get('status')
151	
152	    if user_id is not None:
153	        query = query.filter_by(user_id=user_id)
154	    if status is not None:
155	        query = query.filter_by(status=status)
156	
157	    orders = query.all()
158	    return jsonify({
159	        'status': 'ok',
160	        'data': [
161	            {
162	                'id': o.id,
163	                'user_id': o.user_id,
164	                'status': o.status,
165	                'total_amount': o.total_amount,
166	                'created_at': o.created_at.isoformat() if o.created_at else None,
167	            }
168	            for o in orders
169	        ]
170	    }), 200

1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Product: id, name, price (float), stock (int)
7	- Order: id, user_id (string), status (string), total_amount (float),
8	         created_at, paid_at, shipped_at, delivered_at, cancelled_at
9	- OrderItem: id, order_id (FK), product_id (FK), quantity (int), unit_price (float)
10	- PaymentRequest: id, order_id (FK), idempotency_key (string), status (string), created_at
11	
12	Order status values: 'pending', 'paid', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled'
13	"""
14	
15	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
16	from datetime import datetime
17	import sys
18	import os
19	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
20	
21	from app import db
22	
23	
24	class Product(db.Model):
25	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
26	    name = db.Column(db.String(120), nullable=False)
27	    price = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False)
28	    stock = db.Column(db.Integer, nullable=False, default=0)
29	
30	
31	class Order(db.Model):
32	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
33	    user_id = db.Column(db.String(50), nullable=False)
34	    status = db.Column(db.String(20), nullable=False, default='pending')
35	    total_amount = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False, default=0.0)
36	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
37	    paid_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
38	    shipped_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
39	    delivered_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
40	    cancelled_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
41	    items = db.relationship('OrderItem', backref='order', lazy=True)
42	
43	
44	class OrderItem(db.Model):
45	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
46	    order_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
47	    product_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('product.id'), nullable=False)
48	    quantity = db.Column(db.Integer, nullable=False)
49	    unit_price = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False)
50	
51	
52	class PaymentRequest(db.Model):
53	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
54	    order_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
55	    idempotency_key = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False, unique=True)
56	    status = db.Column(db.String(20), nullable=False, default='pending')
57	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
58

content.text:
## 测试报告

---

### 1. 当前 ATU (ATU-002: Order CRUD) 相关的测试结果

| 测试 | 结果 |
|------|------|
| `TestOrderCRUD::test_create_order` | PASSED |
| `TestOrderCRUD::test_create_order_insufficient_stock` | PASSED |
| `TestOrderCRUD::test_create_order_total_calculation` | PASSED |
| `TestOrderCRUD::test_filter_orders` | PASSED |

**ATU-002 结论：4/4 全部通过。** Developer 在 `starter/routes_order.py` 中实现的 POST /orders（含商品存在性校验、库存校验、总价计算）、GET /orders/id、GET /orders（支持 user_id 和 status 筛选）均符合预期。

---

### 2. Sprint Goal 相关的测试结果

Sprint Goal 为"实现基础 CRUD 功能 -- 商品路由 + 订单路由，确保 TestProductCRUD 和 TestOrderCRUD 全部通过"。

| 测试类 | 通过/总数 |
|--------|----------|
| TestProductCRUD | 3/3 PASSED |
| TestOrderCRUD | 4/4 PASSED |
| **合计** | **7/7 PASSED** |

**Sprint Goal 结论：达成。** 全部 7 个 Sprint Goal 相关测试通过。

---

### 3. 全部测试汇总

| 测试类 | 通过 | 失败 | 总计 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| TestProductCRUD | 3 | 0 | 3 |
| TestOrderCRUD | 4 | 0 | 4 |
| TestStateMachine | 0 | 6 | 6 |
| TestInventory | 2 | 1 | 3 |
| TestIdempotency | 0 | 3 | 3 |
| **合计** | **9** | **10** | **19** |

---

### 4. 失败测试的具体原因分析

所有 10 个失败的测试均属于 ATU-003 范围（状态机、库存扣减、幂等付款），而非当前 ATU-002。失败的根本原因完全一致：`routes_order.py` 中未实现 `/pay`、`/ship`、`/deliver`、`/cancel` 端点，所有对 `POST /orders/<id>/pay`、`POST /orders/<id>/ship`、`POST /orders/<id>/deliver`、`POST /orders/<id>/cancel` 的请求均返回 404。

**按测试类逐一分析：**

**TestStateMachine (6 个失败)**
- `test_pay_order`: POST `/orders/<id>/pay` 返回 404（期望 200）-- 端点不存在
- `test_ship_order`: 依赖 pay 成功，pay 返回 404 导致后续 ship 也返回 404，`resp.json['data']` 为 None
- `test_deliver_order`: 同上，链式依赖 pay -> ship -> deliver 均不存在
- `test_illegal_pending_to_shipped`: POST `/orders/<id>/ship` 返回 404（期望 409）-- 端点不存在
- `test_illegal_paid_to_delivered`: POST `/orders/<id>/deliver` 返回 404（期望 409）-- 端点不存在
- `test_delivered_cannot_be_cancelled`: POST `/orders/<id>/cancel` 返回 404（期望 409）-- 端点不存在

**TestInventory (1 个失败)**
- `test_pay_deducts_stock`: pay 端点不存在（返回 404），库存未被扣减，stock 仍为 10（期望 7）
- `test_cancel_paid_restores_stock`: PASSED（因为 cancel 端点未实现返回 404，但 pending 订单库存本来就不应该变，测试碰巧通过）
- `test_cancel_pending_no_stock_change`: PASSED（同理）

**TestIdempotency (3 个失败)**
- `test_duplicate_pay_same_key`: pay 端点不存在，库存未扣减，stock 仍为 10（期望 7）
- `test_different_key_different_request`: pay 端点返回 404（期望 409）
- `test_missing_idempotency_key`: pay 端点返回 404（期望 400）

**需要修复的内容（ATU-003 范围，非当前 Sprint）：**

1. 在 `starter/routes_order.py` 中实现 `POST /orders/<id>/pay` 端点：验证 Idempotency-Key（必需），检查订单状态为 pending，扣减商品库存，创建 PaymentRequest 记录，更新订单状态为 paid 并设置 paid_at
2. 实现 `POST /orders/<id>/ship` 端点：检查订单状态为 paid，更新为 shipped 并设置 shipped_at
3. 实现 `POST /orders/<id>/deliver` 端点：检查订单状态为 shipped，更新为 delivered 并设置 delivered_at
4. 实现 `POST /orders/<id>/cancel` 端点：检查订单状态为 pending 或 paid，更新为 cancelled 并设置 cancelled_at；若订单已 paid，需恢复商品库存

content.text:
## 测试报告

---

### 1. 当前 ATU (ATU-002: Order CRUD) 相关的测试结果

| 测试 | 结果 |
|------|------|
| `TestOrderCRUD::test_create_order` | PASSED |
| `TestOrderCRUD::test_create_order_insufficient_stock` | PASSED |
| `TestOrderCRUD::test_create_order_total_calculation` | PASSED |
| `TestOrderCRUD::test_filter_orders` | PASSED |

**ATU-002 结论：4/4 全部通过。** Developer 在 `starter/routes_order.py` 中实现的 POST /orders（含商品存在性校验、库存校验、总价计算）、GET /orders/id、GET /orders（支持 user_id 和 status 筛选）均符合预期。

---

### 2. Sprint Goal 相关的测试结果

Sprint Goal 为"实现基础 CRUD 功能 -- 商品路由 + 订单路由，确保 TestProductCRUD 和 TestOrderCRUD 全部通过"。

| 测试类 | 通过/总数 |
|--------|----------|
| TestProductCRUD | 3/3 PASSED |
| TestOrderCRUD | 4/4 PASSED |
| **合计** | **7/7 PASSED** |

**Sprint Goal 结论：达成。** 全部 7 个 Sprint Goal 相关测试通过。

---

### 3. 全部测试汇总

| 测试类 | 通过 | 失败 | 总计 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| TestProductCRUD | 3 | 0 | 3 |
| TestOrderCRUD | 4 | 0 | 4 |
| TestStateMachine | 0 | 6 | 6 |
| TestInventory | 2 | 1 | 3 |
| TestIdempotency | 0 | 3 | 3 |
| **合计** | **9** | **10** | **19** |

---

### 4. 失败测试的具体原因分析

所有 10 个失败的测试均属于 ATU-003 范围（状态机、库存扣减、幂等付款），而非当前 ATU-002。失败的根本原因完全一致：`routes_order.py` 中未实现 `/pay`、`/ship`、`/deliver`、`/cancel` 端点，所有对 `POST /orders/<id>/pay`、`POST /orders/<id>/ship`、`POST /orders/<id>/deliver`、`POST /orders/<id>/cancel` 的请求均返回 404。

**按测试类逐一分析：**

**TestStateMachine (6 个失败)**
- `test_pay_order`: POST `/orders/<id>/pay` 返回 404（期望 200）-- 端点不存在
- `test_ship_order`: 依赖 pay 成功，pay 返回 404 导致后续 ship 也返回 404，`resp.json['data']` 为 None
- `test_deliver_order`: 同上，链式依赖 pay -> ship -> deliver 均不存在
- `test_illegal_pending_to_shipped`: POST `/orders/<id>/ship` 返回 404（期望 409）-- 端点不存在
- `test_illegal_paid_to_delivered`: POST `/orders/<id>/deliver` 返回 404（期望 409）-- 端点不存在
- `test_delivered_cannot_be_cancelled`: POST `/orders/<id>/cancel` 返回 404（期望 409）-- 端点不存在

**TestInventory (1 个失败)**
- `test_pay_deducts_stock`: pay 端点不存在（返回 404），库存未被扣减，stock 仍为 10（期望 7）
- `test_cancel_paid_restores_stock`: PASSED（因为 cancel 端点未实现返回 404，但 pending 订单库存本来就不应该变，测试碰巧通过）
- `test_cancel_pending_no_stock_change`: PASSED（同理）

**TestIdempotency (3 个失败)**
- `test_duplicate_pay_same_key`: pay 端点不存在，库存未扣减，stock 仍为 10（期望 7）
- `test_different_key_different_request`: pay 端点返回 404（期望 409）
- `test_missing_idempotency_key`: pay 端点返回 404（期望 400）

**需要修复的内容（ATU-003 范围，非当前 Sprint）：**

1. 在 `starter/routes_order.py` 中实现 `POST /orders/<id>/pay` 端点：验证 Idempotency-Key（必需），检查订单状态为 pending，扣减商品库存，创建 PaymentRequest 记录，更新订单状态为 paid 并设置 paid_at
2. 实现 `POST /orders/<id>/ship` 端点：检查订单状态为 paid，更新为 shipped 并设置 shipped_at
3. 实现 `POST /orders/<id>/deliver` 端点：检查订单状态为 shipped，更新为 delivered 并设置 delivered_at
4. 实现 `POST /orders/<id>/cancel` 端点：检查订单状态为 pending 或 paid，更新为 cancelled 并设置 cancelled_at；若订单已 paid，需恢复商品库存
Tester 报告：Sprint Goal 7/7 测试全部通过！10 个失败均为 ATU-003 范围的预期行为。委托 Reviewer 审查：

content.content:
1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Order Routes
3	
4	Implement order CRUD, state machine, and payment with idempotency.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'order_bp'.
6	
7	Order state machine:
8	  pending -> paid -> shipped -> delivered
9	  pending/paid -> cancelled
10	
11	Requirements:
12	- POST /orders -> Create order
13	  Request: {"user_id": str, "items": [{"product_id": int, "quantity": int}, ...]}
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": "pending",
15	            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}}
16	  - Validates all products exist and stock is available
17	  - Creates OrderItem records for each product
18	  - total_amount = sum of (product.price * quantity) for all items
19	Errors: 400 if invalid data, product not found, or insufficient stock
20	
21	- GET /orders/<id> -> Get order with items
22	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str,
23	            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str,
24	            "items": [{"id": int, "product_id": int, "quantity": int, "unit_price": float}, ...]}}
25	  Errors: 404 if not found
26	
27	- GET /orders -> List orders, filter by user_id and/or status
28	  Query params: user_id, status
29	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}
30	
31	- POST /orders/<id>/pay -> Pay for order (pending -> paid)
32	  Header: Idempotency-Key (required)
33	  - Deducts stock from products
34	  - Records PaymentRequest for idempotency
35	  - Duplicate Idempotency-Key returns same result without re-processing
36	Errors: 404 if order not found, 400 if no key, 409 if invalid state transition
37	
38	- POST /orders/<id>/ship -> Ship order (paid -> shipped)
39	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
40	
41	- POST /orders/<id>/deliver -> Deliver order (shipped -> delivered)
42	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
43	
44	- POST /orders/<id>/cancel -> Cancel order (pending/paid -> cancelled)
45	  - Restores product stock if order was paid
46	Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
47	
48	IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest, Product)
49	and routes_product.py. Stock deduction happens at payment time, not order creation.
50	"""
51	
52	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
53	from app import db
54	from models import Order, OrderItem, Product
55	
56	order_bp = Blueprint('order_bp', __name__)
57	
58	
59	@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['POST'])
60	def create_order():
61	    """Create a new order with validated product items."""
62	    data = request.get_json()
63	    if not data or 'user_id' not in data or 'items' not in data:
64	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing required fields'}), 400
65	
66	    items = data['items']
67	    if not isinstance(items, list) or len(items) == 0:
68	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Items must be a non-empty list'}), 400
69	
70	    # Validate all products exist and stock is sufficient
71	    product_map = {}
72	    total_amount = 0.0
73	    for item in items:
74	        pid = item.get('product_id')
75	        qty = item.get('quantity')
76	        if pid is None or qty is None or qty <= 0:
77	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid item data'}), 400
78	
79	        product = db.session.get(Product, pid)
80	        if product is None:
81	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Product {pid} not found'}), 400
82	        if product.stock < qty:
83	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Insufficient stock for product {pid}'}), 400
84	
85	        product_map[pid] = product
86	        total_amount += product.price * qty
87	
88	    # Create order and order items
89	    order = Order(user_id=data['user_id'], status='pending', total_amount=total_amount)
90	    db.session.add(order)
91	    db.session.flush()  # get order.id
92	
93	    for item in items:
94	        pid = item['product_id']
95	        product = product_map[pid]
96	        order_item = OrderItem(
97	            order_id=order.id,
98	            product_id=pid,
99	            quantity=item['quantity'],
100	            unit_price=product.price,
101	        )
102	        db.session.add(order_item)
103	
104	    db.session.commit()
105	    return jsonify({
106	        'status': 'ok',
107	        'data': {
108	            'id': order.id,
109	            'user_id': order.user_id,
110	            'status': order.status,
111	            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
112	            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
113	        }
114	    }), 201
115	
116	
117	@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>', methods=['GET'])
118	def get_order(order_id):
119	    """Get order detail including items list."""
120	    order = db.session.get(Order, order_id)
121	    if order is None:
122	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Order not found'}), 404
123	
124	    return jsonify({
125	        'status': 'ok',
126	        'data': {
127	            'id': order.id,
128	            'user_id': order.user_id,
129	            'status': order.status,
130	            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
131	            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
132	            'items': [
133	                {
134	                    'id': item.id,
135	                    'product_id': item.product_id,
136	                    'quantity': item.quantity,
137	                    'unit_price': item.unit_price,
138	                }
139	                for item in order.items
140	            ],
141	        }
142	    }), 200
143	
144	
145	@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['GET'])
146	def list_orders():
147	    """List orders with optional user_id and status filters."""
148	    query = Order.query
149	    user_id = request.args.get('user_id')
150	    status = request.args.get('status')
151	
152	    if user_id is not None:
153	        query = query.filter_by(user_id=user_id)
154	    if status is not None:
155	        query = query.filter_by(status=status)
156	
157	    orders = query.all()
158	    return jsonify({
159	        'status': 'ok',
160	        'data': [
161	            {
162	                'id': o.id,
163	                'user_id': o.user_id,
164	                'status': o.status,
165	                'total_amount': o.total_amount,
166	                'created_at': o.created_at.isoformat() if o.created_at else None,
167	            }
168	            for o in orders
169	        ]
170	    }), 200
171

1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Product: id, name, price (float), stock (int)
7	- Order: id, user_id (string), status (string), total_amount (float),
8	         created_at, paid_at, shipped_at, delivered_at, cancelled_at
9	- OrderItem: id, order_id (FK), product_id (FK), quantity (int), unit_price (float)
10	- PaymentRequest: id, order_id (FK), idempotency_key (string), status (string), created_at
11	
12	Order status values: 'pending', 'paid', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled'
13	"""
14	
15	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
16	from datetime import datetime
17	import sys
18	import os
19	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
20	
21	from app import db
22	
23	
24	class Product(db.Model):
25	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
26	    name = db.Column(db.String(120), nullable=False)
27	    price = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False)
28	    stock = db.Column(db.Integer, nullable=False, default=0)
29	
30	
31	class Order(db.Model):
32	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
33	    user_id = db.Column(db.String(50), nullable=False)
34	    status = db.Column(db.String(20), nullable=False, default='pending')
35	    total_amount = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False, default=0.0)
36	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
37	    paid_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
38	    shipped_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
39	    delivered_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
40	    cancelled_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
41	    items = db.relationship('OrderItem', backref='order', lazy=True)
42	
43	
44	class OrderItem(db.Model):
45	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
46	    order_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
47	    product_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('product.id'), nullable=False)
48	    quantity = db.Column(db.Integer, nullable=False)
49	    unit_price = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False)
50	
51	
52	class PaymentRequest(db.Model):
53	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
54	    order_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
55	    idempotency_key = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False, unique=True)
56	    status = db.Column(db.String(20), nullable=False, default='pending')
57	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
58

1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Flask App Factory & DB Initialization
3	
4	This file sets up the Flask app and database. DO NOT MODIFY this file.
5	All business logic goes in the other modules.
6	"""
7	
8	from flask import Flask
9	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
10	import os
11	
12	db = SQLAlchemy()
13	
14	
15	def create_app():
16	    app = Flask(__name__)
17	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///orders.db'
18	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False
19	
20	    db.init_app(app)
21	
22	    # Import and register models
23	    from models import Product, Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest
24	
25	    # Import and register route blueprints
26	    from routes_product import product_bp
27	    from routes_order import order_bp
28	    app.register_blueprint(product_bp)
29	    app.register_blueprint(order_bp)
30	
31	    with app.app_context():
32	        db.create_all()
33	
34	    return app
35	
36	
37	if __name__ == '__main__':
38	    app = create_app()
39	    app.run(debug=True)

1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Product Routes
3	
4	Implement product CRUD routes.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'product_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- GET /products -> List all products
9	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}, ...]}
10	
11	- POST /products -> Create product
12	  Request: {"name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}
13	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}}
14	  Errors: 400 if any required field missing
15	
16	- GET /products/<id> -> Get single product
17	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "price": float, "stock": int}}
18	  Errors: 404 if not found
19	
20	IMPORTANT: Products are used by routes_order.py for inventory management.
21	Make sure the Product model fields match what the order routes expect.
22	"""
23	
24	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
25	from app import db
26	from models import Product
27	
28	product_bp = Blueprint('product_bp', __name__)
29	
30	
31	@product_bp.route('/products', methods=['POST'])
32	def create_product():
33	    data = request.get_json()
34	    if not data or 'name' not in data or 'price' not in data or 'stock' not in data:
35	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing required fields'}), 400
36	    product = Product(name=data['name'], price=data['price'], stock=data['stock'])
37	    db.session.add(product)
38	    db.session.commit()
39	    return jsonify({
40	        'status': 'ok',
41	        'data': {
42	            'id': product.id,
43	            'name': product.name,
44	            'price': product.price,
45	            'stock': product.stock,
46	        }
47	    }), 201
48	
49	
50	@product_bp.route('/products', methods=['GET'])
51	def list_products():
52	    products = Product.query.all()
53	    return jsonify({
54	        'status': 'ok',
55	        'data': [
56	            {'id': p.id, 'name': p.name, 'price': p.price, 'stock': p.stock}
57	            for p in products
58	        ]
59	    }), 200
60	
61	
62	@product_bp.route('/products/<int:product_id>', methods=['GET'])
63	def get_product(product_id):
64	    product = db.session.get(Product, product_id)
65	    if product is None:
66	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Product not found'}), 404
67	    return jsonify({
68	        'status': 'ok',
69	        'data': {
70	            'id': product.id,
71	            'name': product.name,
72	            'price': product.price,
73	            'stock': product.stock,
74	        }
75	    }), 200

content.text:
I have now reviewed all relevant files. Here is my assessment.

---

## 审查结论：审查通过

### 审查要点

- **[功能正确性] 通过**：`starter/routes_order.py` 完整实现了 ATU-002 要求的三个端点：

  1. **POST /orders** (第 59-114 行) -- 校验 `user_id` 和 `items` 字段存在性；遍历 items 校验 `product_id` 和 `quantity` 有效性；通过 `db.session.get(Product, pid)` 检查商品存在性（与 `routes_product.py` 第 64 行风格一致）；校验库存充足；使用 `product_map` 缓存已查商品避免重复查询；计算 `total_amount = sum(price * quantity)`；`db.session.flush()` 获取 `order.id` 后创建 `OrderItem` 记录（`unit_price=product.price`）；单次 `db.session.commit()` 保证原子性；返回 201 及正确响应格式。
  
  2. **GET /orders/<id>** (第 117-142 行) -- 通过 `db.session.get(Order, order_id)` 查询订单，利用 `order.items` 关系加载 `OrderItem` 列表，返回 200 或 404。
  
  3. **GET /orders** (第 145-170 行) -- 支持 `user_id` 和 `status` 查询参数筛选，返回订单列表（不含 items），符合需求描述。

- **[安全性] 通过**：
  - 输入校验覆盖了关键字段缺失（第 63 行）、items 非列表/空列表（第 67 行）、item 字段缺失或 quantity <= 0（第 76 行）。
  - 商品存在性和库存检查在写入数据库之前完成（第 79-83 行），防止脏数据写入。
  - 未发现 SQL 注入或 XSS 风险（使用 SQLAlchemy ORM 参数化查询）。
  - 未实现的状态机端点（pay/ship/deliver/cancel）会自然返回 404，不会暴露未授权行为。

- **[代码质量] 通过**：

## 审查结论：审查通过

### 审查要点

- **[功能正确性] 通过**：`starter/routes_order.py` 完整实现了 ATU-002 要求的三个端点：

  2. **GET /orders/<id>** (第 117-142 行) -- 通过 `db.session.get(Order, order_id)` 查询订单，利用 `order.items` 关系加载 `OrderItem` 列表，返回 200 或 404。
  
  3. **GET /orders** (第 145-170 行) -- 支持 `user_id` 和 `status` 查询参数筛选，返回订单列表（不含 items），符合需求描述。

- **[安全性] 通过**：
  - 输入校验覆盖了关键字段缺失（第 63 行）、items 非列表/空列表（第 67 行）、item 字段缺失或 quantity <= 0（第 76 行）。
  - 商品存在性和库存检查在写入数据库之前完成（第 79-83 行），防止脏数据写入。

  - 原子性保证良好：`flush()` 获取 ID 后批量创建 OrderItem，最后一次 `commit()` 保证事务一致性。
  - `created_at` 使用 `.isoformat()` 序列化并处理了 `None` 情况（第 112、131、166 行），防御性编程到位。
  - 模块 docstring 清晰描述了完整需求范围（含 ATU-003 的状态机部分），为后续迭代提供了明确的实现指引。

input.prompt:
你是 Scrum 团队的 Developer 子 Agent。当前处于 Sprint 2 Round 1。
Sprint Goal: 实现订单状态机、库存扣减和幂等付款，确保 TestStateMachine + TestInventory + TestIdempotency 全部 12 个测试通过

**Scrum 开发原则**：
- 实现**最小可行增量**：只做完成当前 ATU 所需的最少工作，不要过度设计或提前实现未来 ATU 的功能
- 每个增量必须是可以独立运行和测试的
- 如果发现需求不明确，做最简单合理的假设，不要停下来等澄清
- 代码必须通过现有测试才能算完成

请阅读 README.md 了解项目需求。
请阅读 state.json 了解项目上下文和已完成的工作。
请阅读 starter/routes_order.py 了解当前已有的代码（ATU-002 已实现了 POST/GET /orders 端点）。

请实现以下 ATU：
- ATU ID: ATU-003
- 描述: 在 starter/routes_order.py 中添加 4 个状态转换端点：

  1. POST /orders/<id>/pay (pending → paid)
     - 需要 Idempotency-Key header，缺失返回 400
     - 同一 key 重复请求幂等，不重复扣库存（使用 PaymentRequest 模型检查）
     - 扣减商品库存（遍历 OrderItem，对每个 Product 扣减 quantity）
     - 设置 order.paid_at = datetime.utcnow()
     - 设置 PaymentRequest.status = 'paid'
     - 返回 200

  2. POST /orders/<id>/ship (paid → shipped)
     - 设置 order.shipped_at = datetime.utcnow()
     - 非法状态跳转返回 409 Conflict

  3. POST /orders/<id>/deliver (shipped → delivered)
     - 设置 order.delivered_at = datetime.utcnow()
     - 非法状态跳转返回 409 Conflict

  4. POST /orders/<id>/cancel (pending/paid → cancelled)
     - paid 状态取消时回滚库存（遍历 OrderItem，恢复 Product.stock）
     - 设置 order.cancelled_at = datetime.utcnow()
     - 非法状态跳转返回 409 Conflict

- 相关文件: starter/routes_order.py
- 需要额外导入: PaymentRequest (from models), datetime (from datetime)
- Sprint Goal 关联: 这是最后一个 ATU，完成后所有 19 个测试应通过

**重要注意**：
- routes_order.py 已有 POST /orders, GET /orders/<id>, GET /orders 的实现（ATU-002），不要修改已有代码
- 只在文件末尾添加新的端点函数
- 状态机合法转换：pending→paid, paid→shipped, shipped→delivered, pending→cancelled, paid→cancelled
- 所有其他转换返回 409

完成后报告修改了哪些文件。

prompt:
你是 Scrum 团队的 Developer 子 Agent。当前处于 Sprint 2 Round 1。
Sprint Goal: 实现订单状态机、库存扣减和幂等付款，确保 TestStateMachine + TestInventory + TestIdempotency 全部 12 个测试通过

**Scrum 开发原则**：
- 实现**最小可行增量**：只做完成当前 ATU 所需的最少工作，不要过度设计或提前实现未来 ATU 的功能
- 每个增量必须是可以独立运行和测试的
- 如果发现需求不明确，做最简单合理的假设，不要停下来等澄清
- 代码必须通过现有测试才能算完成

请阅读 README.md 了解项目需求。
请阅读 state.json 了解项目上下文和已完成的工作。
请阅读 starter/routes_order.py 了解当前已有的代码（ATU-002 已实现了 POST/GET /orders 端点）。

请实现以下 ATU：
- ATU ID: ATU-003
- 描述: 在 starter/routes_order.py 中添加 4 个状态转换端点：

  1. POST /orders/<id>/pay (pending → paid)
     - 需要 Idempotency-Key header，缺失返回 400
     - 同一 key 重复请求幂等，不重复扣库存（使用 PaymentRequest 模型检查）
     - 扣减商品库存（遍历 OrderItem，对每个 Product 扣减 quantity）
     - 设置 order.paid_at = datetime.utcnow()
     - 设置 PaymentRequest.status = 'paid'
     - 返回 200

  2. POST /orders/<id>/ship (paid → shipped)
     - 设置 order.shipped_at = datetime.utcnow()
     - 非法状态跳转返回 409 Conflict

  3. POST /orders/<id>/deliver (shipped → delivered)
     - 设置 order.delivered_at = datetime.utcnow()
     - 非法状态跳转返回 409 Conflict

  4. POST /orders/<id>/cancel (pending/paid → cancelled)
     - paid 状态取消时回滚库存（遍历 OrderItem，恢复 Product.stock）
     - 设置 order.cancelled_at = datetime.utcnow()
     - 非法状态跳转返回 409 Conflict

- 相关文件: starter/routes_order.py
- 需要额外导入: PaymentRequest (from models), datetime (from datetime)
- Sprint Goal 关联: 这是最后一个 ATU，完成后所有 19 个测试应通过

**重要注意**：
- routes_order.py 已有 POST /orders, GET /orders/<id>, GET /orders 的实现（ATU-002），不要修改已有代码
- 只在文件末尾添加新的端点函数
- 状态机合法转换：pending→paid, paid→shipped, shipped→delivered, pending→cancelled, paid→cancelled
- 所有其他转换返回 409

完成后报告修改了哪些文件。

content.content:
1	# T2-2：订单系统 — 订单状态机 + 库存扣减（多模块版本）
2	
3	## 项目结构
4	
5	```
6	starter/
7	  app.py              # Flask app 工厂 + DB 初始化（请勿修改）
8	  models.py           # 数据模型（Product, Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest）
9	  routes_product.py   # 商品管理路由 —— 已实现
10	  routes_order.py     # 订单管理路由 —— 需要实现
11	  requirements.txt    # 依赖
12	```
13	
14	## 重要提示
15	
16	这是一个**多模块项目**，代码分布在多个文件中。各模块之间有 import 依赖：
17	- `routes_product.py` 和 `routes_order.py` 需要从 `models.py` 导入模型
18	- `routes_order.py` 的付款逻辑需要操作 `Product` 的 `stock` 字段
19	- `app.py` 负责组装所有模块（请勿修改）
20	
21	**请确保各模块之间的接口（模型字段名、状态值、关联关系）保持一致。**
22	
23	## 功能要求
24	
25	### 1. 数据模型（models.py）
26	- Product: id, name, price (float), stock (int)
27	- Order: id, user_id (string), status (string), total_amount (float), created_at, paid_at, shipped_at, delivered_at, cancelled_at
28	- OrderItem: id, order_id (FK), product_id (FK), quantity (int), unit_price (float)
29	- PaymentRequest: id, order_id (FK), idempotency_key (unique string), status, created_at
30	- Order status 有效值：`pending`, `paid`, `shipped`, `delivered`, `cancelled`
31	
32	### 2. 商品路由（routes_product.py）— 已实现
33	- `GET /products` → 列出所有商品
34	- `POST /products` → 创建商品
35	- `GET /products/<id>` → 获取商品详情
36	
37	### 3. 订单路由（routes_order.py）— 需要实现
38	使用 `order_bp = Blueprint('order_bp', __name__)`
39	- `POST /orders` → 创建订单 `{"user_id": "u1", "items": [{"product_id": 1, "quantity": 2}]}`
40	  - 校验库存，计算 total_amount，初始状态 `pending`
41	- `GET /orders/<id>` → 获取订单详情（含 items 列表）
42	- `GET /orders?user_id=X&status=Y` → 筛选订单
43	- `POST /orders/<id>/pay` → 支付（pending → paid）
44	  - 需要 `Idempotency-Key` header，缺失返回 400
45	  - 同一 key 重复请求幂等，不重复扣库存
46	  - 扣减商品库存
47	- `POST /orders/<id>/ship` → 发货（paid → shipped）
48	- `POST /orders/<id>/deliver` → 送达（shipped → delivered）
49	- `POST /orders/<id>/cancel` → 取消（pending/paid → cancelled）
50	  - paid 状态取消时回滚库存
51	- 非法状态跳转返回 409 Conflict
52	
53	### 接口返回格式
54	
55	```json
56	{"status": "ok", "data": ...}
57	{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}
58	```
59	
60	## 验收标准
61	
62	1. ✅ 所有上述 API 接口可正常调用
63	2. ✅ `tests/test_basic.py` 中的所有测试用例通过
64	
65	## 测试
66	
67	```bash
68	cd starter && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd .. && python -m pytest tests/ -v
69	```
70

1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Order Routes
3	
4	Implement order CRUD, state machine, and payment with idempotency.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'order_bp'.
6	
7	Order state machine:
8	  pending -> paid -> shipped -> delivered
9	  pending/paid -> cancelled
10	
11	Requirements:
12	- POST /orders -> Create order
13	  Request: {"user_id": str, "items": [{"product_id": int, "quantity": int}, ...]}
14	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": "pending",
15	            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str}}
16	  - Validates all products exist and stock is available
17	  - Creates OrderItem records for each product
18	  - total_amount = sum of (product.price * quantity) for all items
19	Errors: 400 if invalid data, product not found, or insufficient stock
20	
21	- GET /orders/<id> -> Get order with items
22	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "user_id": str, "status": str,
23	            "total_amount": float, "created_at": str,
24	            "items": [{"id": int, "product_id": int, "quantity": int, "unit_price": float}, ...]}}
25	  Errors: 404 if not found
26	
27	- GET /orders -> List orders, filter by user_id and/or status
28	  Query params: user_id, status
29	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}
30	
31	- POST /orders/<id>/pay -> Pay for order (pending -> paid)
32	  Header: Idempotency-Key (required)
33	  - Deducts stock from products
34	  - Records PaymentRequest for idempotency
35	  - Duplicate Idempotency-Key returns same result without re-processing
36	Errors: 404 if order not found, 400 if no key, 409 if invalid state transition
37	
38	- POST /orders/<id>/ship -> Ship order (paid -> shipped)
39	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
40	
41	- POST /orders/<id>/deliver -> Deliver order (shipped -> delivered)
42	  Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
43	
44	- POST /orders/<id>/cancel -> Cancel order (pending/paid -> cancelled)
45	  - Restores product stock if order was paid
46	Errors: 404 if not found, 409 if invalid state
47	
48	IMPORTANT: This module works with models.py (Order, OrderItem, PaymentRequest, Product)
49	and routes_product.py. Stock deduction happens at payment time, not order creation.
50	"""
51	
52	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
53	from app import db
54	from models import Order, OrderItem, Product
55	
56	order_bp = Blueprint('order_bp', __name__)
57	
58	
59	@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['POST'])
60	def create_order():
61	    """Create a new order with validated product items."""
62	    data = request.get_json()
63	    if not data or 'user_id' not in data or 'items' not in data:
64	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing required fields'}), 400
65	
66	    items = data['items']
67	    if not isinstance(items, list) or len(items) == 0:
68	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Items must be a non-empty list'}), 400
69	
70	    # Validate all products exist and stock is sufficient
71	    product_map = {}
72	    total_amount = 0.0
73	    for item in items:
74	        pid = item.get('product_id')
75	        qty = item.get('quantity')
76	        if pid is None or qty is None or qty <= 0:
77	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid item data'}), 400
78	
79	        product = db.session.get(Product, pid)
80	        if product is None:
81	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Product {pid} not found'}), 400
82	        if product.stock < qty:
83	            return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': f'Insufficient stock for product {pid}'}), 400
84	
85	        product_map[pid] = product
86	        total_amount += product.price * qty
87	
88	    # Create order and order items
89	    order = Order(user_id=data['user_id'], status='pending', total_amount=total_amount)
90	    db.session.add(order)
91	    db.session.flush()  # get order.id
92	
93	    for item in items:
94	        pid = item['product_id']
95	        product = product_map[pid]
96	        order_item = OrderItem(
97	            order_id=order.id,
98	            product_id=pid,
99	            quantity=item['quantity'],
100	            unit_price=product.price,
101	        )
102	        db.session.add(order_item)
103	
104	    db.session.commit()
105	    return jsonify({
106	        'status': 'ok',
107	        'data': {
108	            'id': order.id,
109	            'user_id': order.user_id,
110	            'status': order.status,
111	            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
112	            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
113	        }
114	    }), 201
115	
116	
117	@order_bp.route('/orders/<int:order_id>', methods=['GET'])
118	def get_order(order_id):
119	    """Get order detail including items list."""
120	    order = db.session.get(Order, order_id)
121	    if order is None:
122	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Order not found'}), 404
123	
124	    return jsonify({
125	        'status': 'ok',
126	        'data': {
127	            'id': order.id,
128	            'user_id': order.user_id,
129	            'status': order.status,
130	            'total_amount': order.total_amount,
131	            'created_at': order.created_at.isoformat() if order.created_at else None,
132	            'items': [
133	                {
134	                    'id': item.id,
135	                    'product_id': item.product_id,
136	                    'quantity': item.quantity,
137	                    'unit_price': item.unit_price,
138	                }
139	                for item in order.items
140	            ],
141	        }
142	    }), 200
143	
144	
145	@order_bp.route('/orders', methods=['GET'])
146	def list_orders():
147	    """List orders with optional user_id and status filters."""
148	    query = Order.query
149	    user_id = request.args.get('user_id')
150	    status = request.args.get('status')
151	
152	    if user_id is not None:
153	        query = query.filter_by(user_id=user_id)
154	    if status is not None:
155	        query = query.filter_by(status=status)
156	
157	    orders = query.all()
158	    return jsonify({
159	        'status': 'ok',
160	        'data': [
161	            {
162	                'id': o.id,
163	                'user_id': o.user_id,
164	                'status': o.status,
165	                'total_amount': o.total_amount,
166	                'created_at': o.created_at.isoformat() if o.created_at else None,
167	            }
168	            for o in orders
169	        ]
170	    }), 200
171

1	"""
2	T2 Order System — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Product: id, name, price (float), stock (int)
7	- Order: id, user_id (string), status (string), total_amount (float),
8	         created_at, paid_at, shipped_at, delivered_at, cancelled_at
9	- OrderItem: id, order_id (FK), product_id (FK), quantity (int), unit_price (float)
10	- PaymentRequest: id, order_id (FK), idempotency_key (string), status (string), created_at
11	
12	Order status values: 'pending', 'paid', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled'
13	"""
14	
15	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
16	from datetime import datetime
17	import sys
18	import os
19	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
20	
21	from app import db
22	
23	
24	class Product(db.Model):
25	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
26	    name = db.Column(db.String(120), nullable=False)
27	    price = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False)
28	    stock = db.Column(db.Integer, nullable=False, default=0)
29	
30	
31	class Order(db.Model):
32	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
33	    user_id = db.Column(db.String(50), nullable=False)
34	    status = db.Column(db.String(20), nullable=False, default='pending')
35	    total_amount = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False, default=0.0)
36	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
37	    paid_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
38	    shipped_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
39	    delivered_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
40	    cancelled_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
41	    items = db.relationship('OrderItem', backref='order', lazy=True)
42	
43	
44	class OrderItem(db.Model):
45	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
46	    order_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
47	    product_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('product.id'), nullable=False)
48	    quantity = db.Column(db.Integer, nullable=False)
49	    unit_price = db.Column(db.Float, nullable=False)
50	
51	
52	class PaymentRequest(db.Model):
53	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
54	    order_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('order.id'), nullable=False)
55	    idempotency_key = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False, unique=True)
56	    status = db.Column(db.String(20), nullable=False, default='pending')
57	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
